overview: The Kingdom of Heaven Embassy is a sovereign, constitutional digital embassy platform delivering transformational spiritual governance. Citizens are onboarded through a constitutional agreement, access a Symphony AI Bible, Knowledge Vault, tiered Media Library, and Sacred Documents — all in a deep navy and gold governmental aesthetic.
features: About Us, Founder, Mission & Vision, Legacy Ambassador navigation tabs
Sovereign Seal anatomy breakdown as dedicated tab
Alien State Protocol with EJI Declaration and acceptance flow
Official Proclamation and Cabinet of Sovereign Jurisdictions in Mission & Vision
Dual-Protocol Agreement preamble in citizen onboarding
Mind-Renewal Glossary tab in Knowledge Vault
Symphony AI Bible with OpenAI integration
Tiered Media Library with view-only copy-protected PDF viewer
Sacred Documents section with Teaching Slides and Kingdom Protocols
Admin media management panel for Legacy Ambassador
